query:
INSERT INTO `role_permissions` (`role`, `modules`, `description`) VALUES
('super_admin', '["dev","listing","ops","service","knowledge","admin"]', '超级管理员 - 所有模块完全访问权限'),
('admin', '["dev","listing","ops","service","knowledge","admin"]', '公司管理员 - 所有模块完全访问权限'),
('ops_manager', '["listing","knowledge","ops"]', '运营主管 - Listing、知识库和运营模块'),
('ops_specialist', '["listing","knowledge"]', '运营专员 - Listing和知识库模块'),
('product_dev', '["dev","knowledge"]', '产品开发 - 产品开发和知识库模块'),
('finance', '["dev"]', '财务 - 产品开发模块'),
('purchaser', '["dev"]', '采购 - 产品开发模块'),
('designer', '["listing","knowledge"]', '美工 - Listing和知识库模块')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `modules` = VALUES(`modules`), `description` = VALUES(`description`);
